syntax_9231.creator: DereWah
syntax_9231.title: New Anvil GUI
syntax_9231.description: Returns a new anvil gui. If no title and default text are specified, it will use some placeholder text. If  you choose to specify the name or the text, you have to specify both.
syntax_9231.syntax_pattern:
new anvil gui
[a] new anvil gui (named|with title) %string% with [default] text %string%

en: Returns a new anvil gui. If no title and default text are specified, it will use some placeholder text. If  you choose to specify the name or the text, you have to specify both.

syntax_9228.creator: DereWah
syntax_9228.title: Anvil GUI
syntax_9228.description: This type holds all the information about an AnvilGUI inventory. You can create a new object with the new anvil gui expression and edit its content (such as the items) with the specific expressions.
syntax_9228.type_usage: This type holds all the information about an AnvilGUI inventory.

en: This type holds all the information about an AnvilGUI inventory. You can create a new object with the new anvil gui expression and edit its content (such as the items) with the specific expressions.

syntax_9233.creator: DereWah
syntax_9233.title: Anvil GUI Text
syntax_9233.description: Access the default text of an AnvilGUI. This will be filled when the anvil is opened to a player.

en: Access the default text of an AnvilGUI. This will be filled when the anvil is opened to a player.

syntax_9232.creator: DereWah
syntax_9232.title: Anvil GUI Title
syntax_9232.description: Access the title (inventory name) of an Anvil GUI. In 1.12.2, the name of the AnvilGUI will not change when displayed. This is not really an issue (other than for aesthetic) as the title is still saved and can be accessed (to check for specific anvil GUIs in events).

en: Access the title (inventory name) of an Anvil GUI. In 1.12.2, the name of the AnvilGUI will not change when displayed. This is not really an issue (other than for aesthetic) as the title is still saved and can be accessed (to check for specific anvil GUIs in events).

syntax_9230.creator: DereWah
syntax_9230.title: Anvil GUI Close
syntax_9230.description: Fires whenever an anvil gui created with this addon is closed. You can access the following values from this event: event-text (content of the GUI when the GUI was closed), event-anvil gui (the original anvil object. You can access items in the anvil GUI or its inventory title with expressions below.)
syntax_9230.event_values:
event-text (Text input in the ANVIL)
event-virtual anvil (Original opened anvil)

en: Fires whenever an anvil gui created with this addon is closed. You can access the following values from this event: event-text (content of the GUI when the GUI was closed), event-anvil gui (the original anvil object. You can access items in the anvil GUI or its inventory title with expressions below.)

syntax_9227.creator: DereWah
syntax_9227.title: Open Anvil GUI
syntax_9227.description: Open an Anvil GUI to a player. Note that once the AnvilGUI is opened to a player, you can't change it "live" while it's being shown. Therefore you first must set the slots of the GUI, and then open it to the player.

en: Open an Anvil GUI to a player. Note that once the AnvilGUI is opened to a player, you can't change it "live" while it's being shown. Therefore you first must set the slots of the GUI, and then open it to the player.

syntax_9229.creator: DereWah
syntax_9229.title: Anvil GUI Click
syntax_9229.description: Fires whenever an anvil gui created with this addon is clicked. You can access the following values from this event: event-integer (index of slot that was clicked), event-text (content of the GUI when the GUI was clicked), event-anvil gui (the original anvil object. You can access items in the anvil GUI or its inventory title with expressions below.)
syntax_9229.event_values:
event-integer (ID of clicked slot)
event-text (Text input in the ANVIL)
event-virtual anvil (Original opened anvil)

en: Fires whenever an anvil gui created with this addon is clicked. You can access the following values from this event: event-integer (index of slot that was clicked), event-text (content of the GUI when the GUI was clicked), event-anvil gui (the original anvil object. You can access items in the anvil GUI or its inventory title with expressions below.)

syntax_9234.creator: DereWah
syntax_9234.title: Anvil GUI Slot
syntax_9234.description: Access a specific item in the anvil GUI. You can set these to any itemstack. Please note that the server wipes and overwrites the items in the output GUI when opened, so as of right now only changing the left and right item works.

en: Access a specific item in the anvil GUI. You can set these to any itemstack. Please note that the server wipes and overwrites the items in the output GUI when opened, so as of right now only changing the left and right item works.
